diffs.diff:
--- a/inspect_render.py
+++ b/inspect_render.py
@@ -0,0 +1,25 @@
+import sys, os

+sys.path.insert(0, '/opt/triposr')

+from tsr.system import TSR

+import inspect, json

+

+model = TSR.from_pretrained('checkpoints/triposr', config_name='config.yaml', weight_name='model.ckpt')

+print('=== TSR.render source ===')

+print(inspect.getsource(TSR.render))

+print('\n=== Renderer config ===')

+if hasattr(model.renderer, 'cfg'):

+    print(model.renderer.cfg)

+print('\n=== Example training object camera data ===')

+train_dir = '/data/train'

+objs = sorted(os.listdir(train_dir))

+if objs:

+    obj = objs[0]

+    cams_path = os.path.join(train_dir, obj, 'cameras.json')

+    with open(cams_path) as f:

+        cams = json.load(f)

+    print(f'Object {obj}: {len(cams)} views')

+    print(f'First two views: {cams[:2]}')

+    # also see input image size

+    from PIL import Image

+    img = Image.open(os.path.join(train_dir, obj, 'input.png'))

+    print(f'Input image size: {img.size}')
